name: CALIFORNIA et al. v. SIERRA CLUB et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in CALIFORNIA et al. v. SIERRA CLUB et al. (451 U.S. 287, 1980 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
